sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ النَّاسُ الْعَيْشَ مَعَ الآخَرِينَ وَلَيْسَ وَحْدَهُمْ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi vole živjeti s drugima a ne sami.
sentences.translationEn: People like to live with others and not alone.

sentences.arabic: نَشْعُرُ بِالسَّعَادَةِ حِينَ نَكُونُ مَعَ أَصْدِقَائِنَا.
sentences.translation: Osjećamo se sretno kada smo sa prijateljima.
sentences.translationEn: We feel happy when we are with our friends.

sentences.arabic: الإِنْسَانُ يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى شَخْصٍ يَتَحَدَّثُ مَعَهُ.
sentences.translation: Čovjeku treba neko s kim će razgovarati.
sentences.translationEn: A person needs someone to talk with.
Loneliness sometimes makes the heart sad.
